title: berkheya pinnatifida subsp. ingrata
intro: Berkheya pinnatifida subsp. ingrata is a subspecies of the Berkheya pinnatifida plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is believed to have antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
